title: おつかいは人のためならず

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On a day off, I spot Grass Wonder and Hishi
Amazon standing by the front gate.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh, hello there, Trainer. Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hishiama and I are about to go buy some things
for the dorm.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Sorry you always get stuck carryin' bags. Nobody
else ever steps up.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: No, this is no trouble at all.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh? Are you sure?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Yeah, please! I'll take all the help I can get!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Very well, then. We won't turn down your
generosity.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
All right, how about we split up? You and Grass
can work together.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
We need to stock the kitchen and get some house
supplies. Which do you wanna take care of?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
If I remember right... the list for house supplies is
a bit longer.

text_block_list.name: Grocer
text_block_list.text:
Our prices can't be beat! We just started a
limited-time sale, so don't miss out!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Did you hear that? The grocer is having a flash
sale.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Which would you like to do, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, what a coincidence. I was thinking the same
thing.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Kay, I'll hit up the general store, then. This
scene's all you!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: There's already a crowd forming at the entrance...
choice_data_list: You sure you're up to this?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Please don't worry about me.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I might not enjoy crowded or noisy places, but
that itself is the battle.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Nothing ventured, nothing gained, as they say.
Hehehe...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: No time for second thoughts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder swiftly weaves through the swarm
of gathering shoppers.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Excuse me. I'm waiting in this line.

text_block_list.name: Lady A
text_block_list.text: Hey! You're in my way!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
May I ask that you mind your manners and wait in
line like the rest of us?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She skillfully manages to keep the pushy shopper
from shoehorning her way into the middle of the
line.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Do you mind if I grab a few of these carrots?

text_block_list.name: Lady B
text_block_list.text: G-go right ahead!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She confirms with the people around her before
reaching in to grab a few discounted carrots.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Phew... Here are all my spoils.
choice_data_list: That was a master class in shopping...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder downright conquers the flash sale
without a single blemish on her display of
decorum.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Don't be silly. You haven't seen anything yet.

text_block_list.name: Clerk A
text_block_list.text:
That's right, folks! You won't find 'em cheaper
elsewhere!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh? That store over there is having a flash sale
too...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Heheh, shall we be on our way? ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We pass several more stores holding limited time
sales and end up with a troubling number of bags.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry. I got a little carried away...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! It's all good! Our dormies eat like there's
no tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hishiama... Thank you so much.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder's competitive spirit comes out in
full force, even on shopping trips.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
There are more supplies on the list than groceries,
so it'd make sense for the two of us to tackle it.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Kay! I'll handle the food shoppin', and you can
take care of the other stuff!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Could I ask you to carry the bags?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
We'll be able to take back more than usual thanks
to your help.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
A refill of hand soap, check. Next are refills of
detergent and air freshener...
choice_data_list: That's a lot of refill bags.
That's a lot of refill bags.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Saving when you can is important. And so is the
treat that comes later... Hehe. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We check everything off the list, meet back up
with Hishi Amazon, and give her the change.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: One, two, three... Whoa, thrifty, aren't ya!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Nice goin', Grass! You're so responsible, I can
always count on ya.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: No, no. My trainer deserves a lot of the credit.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I gotcha! Well, as thanks for helpin', lemme treat
ya to somethin' with the change!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're too generous. How about some snacks
to go with tea?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I was just thinking it'd be nice to have a little tea
ceremony together. If you wouldn't mind, that is.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: That's an awesome idea!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so the three of us enjoy a relaxing teatime
together.
